name: Product Manager
description: Specs, summaries, stakeholder syncs — less code, more text and decisions.

skills.rationale: Convert internal docs to readable guides
Decompose competitor products into learnable phases
Maintain CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md as living spec
Turns fuzzy product intent into scoped requirements and acceptance criteria
Summarizes shipped changes into customer-facing and internal release notes
Creates concise weekly updates, decision logs, and launch status notes

agents.rationale: Read and summarize unfamiliar codebases for product context
Breaks product work into milestones, owners, risks, and follow-up questions

mcp.rationale: Triage issues, summarize discussions, draft release notes
Reads local specs, notes, docs, and release artifacts when preparing product summaries
